allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(execution\): implement SignalQueue for #9

Implements the SignalQueue class that manages pending trading signals
from the analysis pipeline, providing a clean interface for the execution
engine to consume.

Features:
- Priority-based ordering \(higher confidence first\)
- Automatic expiration handling
- Deduplication by ticker
- Thread-safe operations
- 100% test coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
